Request.description: A capability request asserted into the engine on the hot path.

fields.query_len: int  — character length of the query (a cheap escalation signal)

Exposure.description: Asserted once per (connection context, candidate tool) to decide rule-based MCP tool exposure. A rule firing means 'expose this tool to this context'; the context-to-tool policy lives entirely in these rules.

fields.context: string — the connection's context label (from the shim handshake)
fields.tool: string — candidate MCP tool name, e.g. memory_search
fields.tool_group: string — segment before the first '_' (memory_search → memory); a neutral derivation, not a policy mapping

SystemMetrics.description: The host's live resource snapshot. Metric rules write explicit fields on the Decision fact.

fields.cpu_pct: int — process CPU percent (sums across cores, so >100 under load)
fields.mem_rss_bytes: int — resident set size in bytes
fields.mem_pss_bytes: int — proportional set size in bytes
fields.mem_pct: int — RSS as a percent of system memory
fields.read_bytes_per_s: int — bytes read from storage per second
fields.write_bytes_per_s: int — bytes written to storage per second
fields.store_bytes: int — audit store size in bytes
fields.memory_store_bytes: int — memory store size in bytes

Field.description: A source schema/header field asserted once per distinct field name so embedding-based semantic detection benefits from cache reuse.

fields.name: string — original field/header name, e.g. ship_addr_1
fields.semantic_type: string — derived field meaning written by rules, e.g. address

AddressText.description: A candidate free-form address string found in any supported medium.

fields.source_field: string — source field/header/path that contained the value
fields.standardized: string — standardized form written by the standardize_address GRL action

AddressContext.description: Business context for selecting the correct address from a customer hierarchy.

fields.brand_owner: string — brand owner or controlling customer

AddressCandidate.description: One selectable analyzed address for an entity in a customer hierarchy.

fields.id: string — stable candidate id from the source system
fields.role: string — brand_owner, bill_to, ship_to, distributor, retailer
fields.entity_kind: string — brand_owner, distributor, retailer, acquired_business, etc.
fields.selected_reason: string — rule-written reason when this candidate wins

AddressDecision.description: Policy-neutral address analysis plus organizational policy fields used by the shared verification rules.

fields.customer: string — customer or account inferred from text or structured fields
fields.role: string — bill_to, ship_to, brand_owner, distributor, retailer, or unknown
fields.standardized: string — standardized address form generated by the analyzer
fields.source_text: string — searchable source text assembled from unstructured input or structured scalar fields
fields.reference_status: string — rule-written status for exact or lexical reference matching
fields.reference_name: string — matched reference record name, when present
fields.address_valid: bool — true when the address has a minimum postal profile
fields.policy_status: string — rule-written status such as pending, invalid, or accepted_by_policy
fields.policy_reason: string — rule-written explanation shown in the UI

Decision.description: Host-neutral output fact populated by GRL then actions.

NativeAddressStandardization.description: Policy-neutral vrules-native address standardization over unstructured text or structured data.

fields.extracted: string — recognized address-like span or assembled structured address
fields.canonical: string — pure deterministic canonical form used for cache/index keys
fields.valid: bool — true when deterministic evidence or index match passes the validity threshold

AddressFieldEvidence.description: Field-level evidence emitted while scanning arbitrary structured records for address data.

fields.path: string — JSON path or streaming field path
fields.role: string — inferred address role such as address_line1, city, region, postal_code
fields.embedding_score: float — optional configured-model field-name semantic evidence

AddressFieldEmbeddingHint.description: One embedding request hint per distinct source field name so repeated streaming schemas reuse cached field-name vectors.

fields.field: string — JSON path or streaming field path
fields.embedding_text: string — normalized text embedded for semantic field recognition
fields.cache_namespace: string — canonicalizer id/version namespace for cache isolation

AddressEmbeddingEvidence.description: Cached semantic evidence supplied back to native address standardization for one source path and target role.

fields.path: string — JSON path or streaming field path
fields.role: string — target address role such as address_line1, city, or postal_code
fields.score: float — semantic similarity from the cached field-name embedding

AddressIndexMatch.description: Native Rust address-index candidate match, including matches from OpenAddresses-compatible licensed records.

fields.score: float — canonical token plus component match score
